_meta.note: Deployed to Polygon Mainnet (chain 137). All contracts source-verified on Polygonscan. Includes original Child First Platform contracts + 8 MOG ecosystem contracts.

CampaignFactory.name: CampaignFactory
CampaignFactory.role: Factory + campaign registry. Owner deploys new campaigns and manages the DonationReceipt contract.
CampaignFactory.notes: Ownable. Owner controls campaign creation. No proxy, no upgrade path.

DonationReceipt.name: DonationReceipt
DonationReceipt.role: Soulbound ERC-721 NFT. Minted once per donation. Non-transferable. On-chain SVG metadata.
DonationReceipt.notes: MINTER_ROLE granted to each Campaign contract. DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE held by factory and admin.

Campaign.name: Campaign
Campaign.role: Per-campaign donation vault. Accepts MATIC, tracks milestones, requires dual-sig disbursal.
Campaign.notes: Each campaign is a separate contract instance deployed by CampaignFactory. OPERATOR_ROLE + DIRECTOR_ROLE required for milestone disbursal.

MOGToken.name: MOGToken
MOGToken.role: ERC-20 governance token for the Men of God DAO. Votes are token-weighted; also rewards members via MINTER_ROLE grantees.
MOGToken.notes: MINTER_ROLE granted to MOGRegistry and TithingVault. Used for governor vote delegation.

FaithBadge.name: FaithBadge
FaithBadge.role: Soulbound ERC-721 achievement NFTs. On-chain SVG. 10 badge types (MEMBER, TITHER, BUILDER, …, INTERCESSOR).
FaithBadge.notes: MINTER_ROLE granted to MOGRegistry, TithingVault, and MissionFactory.

PrayerWall.name: PrayerWall
PrayerWall.role: On-chain prayer request registry. Stores content hash + short subject. Intercessors can claim answered prayers.
PrayerWall.notes: Prayer content stored off-chain; on-chain record stores keccak256 hash + subject.

TithingVault.name: TithingVault
TithingVault.role: Tithe deposit vault. Members deposit MOGToken. Tracks tithe cycles. Mints TITHER FaithBadge on completion.
TithingVault.notes: Holds MINTER_ROLE for both MOGToken and FaithBadge.

MOGRegistry.name: MOGRegistry
MOGRegistry.role: Member registry. Registers members, maintains tiers (Seeker→Apostle), awards MEMBER FaithBadge on join, mints initial MOGToken.
MOGRegistry.notes: Holds MINTER_ROLE for MOGToken and FaithBadge.

MOGTimelock.name: MOGTimelock
MOGTimelock.role: 2-day timelock controller for DAO governance. Queues, delays, and executes MOGGovernor proposals.
MOGTimelock.notes: PROPOSER_ROLE granted to MOGGovernor. EXECUTOR_ROLE open (ZeroAddress). ADMIN_ROLE renounced by deployer — fully decentralised.

MOGGovernor.name: MOGGovernor
MOGGovernor.role: OZ Governor DAO. Token-weighted voting on MOGToken. 2-day timelock. 4% quorum. 1-week voting period.
MOGGovernor.notes: Controls MOGTimelock. Members vote proposals affecting the entire MOG ecosystem.

MissionFactory.name: MissionFactory
MissionFactory.role: Deploys individual Mission contracts. Tracks all active missions. Awards BUILDER FaithBadge on completion.
MissionFactory.notes: Holds MINTER_ROLE for FaithBadge to award BUILDER badge on mission completion.

deployer.label: Deployer Wallet
deployer.purpose: Deploys CampaignFactory and DonationReceipt. Becomes factory owner after deployment.
deployer.note: FUND THIS WALLET WITH MATIC BEFORE DEPLOYING. Consider transferring ownership to a Gnosis Safe after deployment.

treasury.label: Platform Treasury
treasury.purpose: Receives any platform fees (currently 0% — no fees).
treasury.note: No platform fee is currently collected. Treasury address is a placeholder for future governance.
